ham.subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation – Order #123-4567890-1234567
ham.body:
Hi John,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order has been received and is currently being processed.

Order Details:
  • Order #123-4567890-1234567
  • Items: 1× "Bluetooth Wireless Headphones",
  • Total: $89.99 (incl. tax and shipping)

Expected Delivery:
  • Date: 29‑Apr‑2026
  • Time Window: 10:00 am – 4:00 pm

If you need to update your shipping address or change the delivery window, please visit your Amazon account.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

— Amazon.com

spam.subject: Urgent: FedEx Delivery Fee Overdue – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your FedEx shipment (Tracking # 9876543210) was scheduled for delivery on 28‑Apr‑2026 but was unable to be released due to an outstanding delivery fee of $15.00.

To avoid having the package returned to sender, please verify your shipping details and remit the fee within the next 48 hours. Failure to do so may result in additional handling charges or loss of the shipment.

Click here: <URL> to securely process payment and confirm your identity.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Support
